meta.title: CyberRealistic Pony - High-Fidelity Photorealism Meets Pony Diffusion
meta.description: Unlock robust pose control and natural skin textures. CyberRealistic Pony is a premier fine-tune of Pony Diffusion V6 XL, optimized for complex character interactions, custom poses, and lifelike render quality.

hero.title: Generate Anatomically Coherent Realism with Precision
hero.description: Say goodbye to rigid templates and compromised poses. CyberRealistic Pony blends the robust prompt compliance of Pony Diffusion V6 XL with the organic skin textures and cinematic lighting of the CyberRealistic ecosystem, delivering highly controllable character rendering directly.

image.alt: CyberRealistic Pony high-fidelity character generation workflow

branding.title: The premier foundation for expressive character control
branding.description: Developed by Cyberdelia, CyberRealistic Pony addresses the limitations of standard realistic models by inheriting Pony's exceptional compliance with complex actions and multi-subject scenes.

introduce.title: Break free from rigid, static portraits
introduce.description: Standard realistic SDXL models often struggle when generating dynamic angles, interactions, or unconventional outfits. CyberRealistic Pony utilizes Pony's deep text encoder training to interpret complex actions while maintaining realistic skin and eye textures.

image.alt: Dynamic pose comparison between standard photorealism models and CyberRealistic Pony

items.title: Exceptional Pose & Interaction Control
items.description: Generates complex body movements, multi-character interactions, and creative angles with significantly lower rates of anatomical failure.

items.title: Harmonized Tagging System
items.description: Seamlessly interprets structured Danbooru tags alongside natural language, giving you complete artistic command over character attributes.

items.title: Organic Photorealistic Shading
items.description: Overcomes the typical 'flat' or 'anime-style' shading of standard Pony models, introducing moody cinematic lighting and rich pore-level skin details.

benefit.title: Why CyberRealistic Pony is preferred for expressive characters
benefit.description: Whether you are a concept artist, character designer, or digital creator, you need more than just a static portrait. CyberRealistic Pony delivers flexible, production-ready assets with superior composition stability.

image.alt: Digital artist utilizing CyberRealistic Pony in a node-based ComfyUI workflow

items.title: Exceptional pose and action dynamics
items.description: Achieve high physical accuracy and complex styling options with a model trained for robust physical interactions.
bullets: Consistent anatomy even in complex, physical actions
High compliance with highly specific character designs and outfits
Maintains depth, perspective, and clothing physics

items.title: Simplified pipeline and custom nodes
items.description: Drop the model into your workflow and leverage its specialized assets for consistent outputs.
bullets: Fully compatible with standard SDXL interfaces like WebUI, Forge, and ComfyUI
Custom baked-in VAE designed to resolve over-saturation issues
Smooth integration with custom positive and negative embeddings

items.title: Continuous model evolution
items.description: Benefit from developmental cycles focused on balancing realism with structural compliance.
bullets: v1.0 combined Pony V6 with basic realistic textures
v8.5 optimized contrast and skin rendering consistency
v18.0 CoreShift delivers refined light dispersion and advanced pose coherence

usage.title: How to create with CyberRealistic Pony
usage.description: Experience highly responsive character rendering by configuring your workflow with these optimized parameters.

items.title: 1. Load Checkpoint & Embeddings
items.description: Load the latest CyberRealistic Pony safetensors and place the custom positive/negative embeddings in your folder.

items.title: 2. Structure the Hybrid Prompt
items.description: Start with quality tags (e.g., 'score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up') or the positive embedding, followed by descriptive tags.

items.title: 3. Set Generation Parameters
items.description: Configure your sampler to DPM++ 2M Karras, steps to 30+, CFG scale to 5, and set Clip Skip to 2.

items.title: 4. Optimize with Hires.fix
items.description: Perform a 1.55x upscale using 4x_NickelbackFS_72000_G with a denoising strength of 0.45 for rich textures.

feature.title: Optimized features for character concept artists
feature.description: Tuned continuously to maximize creative freedom, CyberRealistic Pony sets a high standard for controllable photorealism.

items.title: Deep Concept Understanding
items.description: Trained to parse complex human interactions and multi-subject details with minimal prompt bleed.

Follows highly detailed, multi-character prompts
Minimizes prompt bleed across distinct subjects

items.description: Engineered specifically to counter Pony's tendency toward over-saturation, keeping colors natural.
bullets: Engineered specifically to counter Pony's over-saturation
Provides natural skin shading and neutral tones

Compatible with massive community LoRA ecosystem

bullets: Specially calibrated to suppress underlying anime aesthetics
Guides the model toward organic photographic rendering

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about CyberRealistic Pony, its parameters, and how to use it.

items.question: What is CyberRealistic Pony?
items.answer: CyberRealistic Pony is an open-source, SDXL fine-tune that blends the expressive composition and robust prompt compliance of Pony Diffusion V6 XL with the photorealistic aesthetic of CyberRealistic.

items.question: How is it different from CyberRealistic XL?
items.answer: CyberRealistic XL is built on standard SDXL 1.0, using natural language to generate realistic scenery and portraiture. CyberRealistic Pony is built on Pony V6, utilizing specific score tags or custom embeddings to generate highly complex poses, interactions, and customized characters with realistic skin textures.

items.question: What are the recommended quality tags?
items.answer: For standard Pony-style prompting, we recommend beginning your positive prompt with 'score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, (your subject)'. You can also use the custom positive embedding 'CyberRealisticPony_POSV1' to bypass manual tag typing and achieve a natural photographic style.

items.question: What are the recommended sampler settings?
items.answer: We recommend using DPM++ 2M Karras, 30+ steps, a CFG scale of 5, and setting Clip Skip to 2. The native generation resolution is 832x1216 or 896x1152.

items.question: Does this model require a separate VAE?
items.answer: No, CyberRealistic Pony features a custom baked-in VAE optimized to reduce over-saturation, so you do not need to download or select an external VAE.

items.question: Can I use it for commercial projects?
items.answer: Yes, the model is distributed under the CreativeML Open RAIL++-M license, which permits commercial use of generated images, provided you follow standard licensing restrictions.

items.question: What are the positive and negative embeddings?
items.answer: These are custom Textual Inversion files (like 'CyberRealistic Positive/Negative - Pony') developed by Cyberdelia. They are placed in your embeddings folder and help guide the model's underlying anime-heavy weights toward realistic photographic textures.

cta.title: Take control of your character generation
cta.description: Stop fighting rigid templates. Generate dynamic, expressive, and highly realistic characters with CyberRealistic Pony today.
